response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience, particularly at re:cinq, where he contributes to Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators and agentic workflows. While his AI-specific experience is slightly underweighted compared to the job's 8-year requirement, his technical leadership, cloud platform familiarity, and customer-facing development align well with the role's core responsibilities.
strengths: Proven technical leadership in AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP at re:cinq) and full-stack development with TypeScript/Python.
Extensive cloud and DevOps experience (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker) with a focus on scalable, production-grade systems.
Strong customer-facing and mentorship skills, evidenced by workshops, open-source contributions, and cross-functional collaboration.
concerns: Only ~2 years of explicit AI/GenAI experience (re:cinq), falling short of the 8-year requirement for production-grade AI solutions.
Limited documented expertise in vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM performance optimization (preferred qualifications).
Diverse but fragmented project history may raise questions about depth in enterprise-scale AI system design.
